title: Learn CSS Grid the easy way
description: Kevin Powell explains that you often do not need to declare rows and covers grid-template-rows for explicit row sizing

title: CSS Grid Intro and Basic Layout Tutorial for Beginners
description: Dave Gray covers grid-template-rows, grid-auto-rows, and how to control row sizing in grid layouts

title: Learn CSS Grid in 20 Minutes
description: Kyle covers grid rows including template rows, row spanning, and the difference between explicit and implicit rows

title: CSS Grid Crash Course
description: Brad Traversy covers grid-template-rows, row spanning, and implicit row creation with practical examples
